en.k3d: 2 strength · 2 swims · 1 hike · 13,986 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 5 – Jul 11 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~378 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's pool intervals and 644 on Sunday's Zagreb hike. Monday (Jul 6) and Friday (Jul 10) were rest days (63 and 32 kcal); Saturday (Jul 11) is just starting — trap-bar deadlift planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −792 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Saturday (Jul 11) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Wednesday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Wednesday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 127, max 153, 65 min) drove 769 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and a clear step up in intensity from the easy technique swims.
en.i2t: Aerobic base: two swims plus a hike
en.i2: Aerobic work came from Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal), Wednesday's harder pool intervals, and Thursday's short 0.8 km pool swim (avg HR 111) — a good mix of easy volume and one quality session.
en.i3t: Recovery: autonomics steady into the weekend
en.i3: This morning RHR held at 54 (right on the 7-day average) and HRV eased to 37 (−3 vs the previous night, just under the 40 baseline). Last night was solid — 6h58 at score 84 — with deep 1h23 and REM 1h24, following the window's longest night (8h27) on Thursday.
en.i4t: Strength: hack squat leads the window's tonnage
en.i4: Hevy tonnage this window: Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg — the only Hevy-logged lift (Thursday's squat, Garmin 59 min, avg HR 108, isn't synced to Hevy). Saturday's trap-bar deadlift is planned for later today.
en.rec: Saturday's plan is the trap-bar deadlift — take it on fresh legs after two rest-lite days. The week behind: 5 sessions across 4 active days (5h07, ~2,942 active kcal) — two strength sessions (hack squat 13,986 kg Tuesday, plus Thursday's squat), two swims (a 2.2 km pool interval set and a short technique swim) and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Monday and Friday were rest days. Recovery is steady: RHR at 54 and HRV 37 (just under baseline) off a solid 6h58 at score 84. Good conditions to load the trap-bar today — let the warm-up gauge the top set. Next: today trap-bar DL, then rest/hike Sunday per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-05 → 2026-07-11 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 2 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 13.986 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 5.7. – 11.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~378 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinim bazenskim intervalima i 644 na nedjeljnom planinarenju u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak (6.7.) i petak (10.7.) bili su dani odmora (63 i 32 kcal); subota (11.7.) tek počinje — planiran trap-bar mrtvo dizanje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −792 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Subota (11.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Srijedin bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Srijedino plivanje 2,2 km u bazenu (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 127, maks 153, 65 min) donijelo je 769 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i jasan skok intenziteta u odnosu na lagana tehnička plivanja.
hr.i2t: Aerobna baza: dva plivanja i planinarenje
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz nedjeljnog planinarenja 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal), srijedinih težih bazenskih intervala i četvrtkovog kratkog plivanja 0,8 km (prosj. puls 111) — dobra mješavina lagane volumene i jednog kvalitetnog treninga.
hr.i3: Jutros je RHR ostao na 54 (točno na 7-dnevnom prosjeku), a HRV se spustio na 37 (−3 vs prethodna noć, tik ispod osnovice od 40). Sinoć čvrsto — 6h58 uz ocjenu 84 — uz duboki san 1h23 i REM 1h24, nakon najduže noći u razdoblju (8h27) u četvrtak.
hr.i4t: Snaga: hack squat vodi u tonaži razdoblja
hr.i4: Hevy tonaža ovog razdoblja: utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg — jedino dizanje zabilježeno u Hevyju (četvrtkov čučanj, Garmin 59 min, prosj. puls 108, nije sinkroniziran s Hevyjem). Subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje planirano je za danas kasnije.
hr.rec: Subotnji plan je trap-bar mrtvo dizanje — odradi ga na svježim nogama nakon dva laganija dana. Tjedan iza: 5 treninga kroz 4 aktivna dana (5h07, ~2.942 aktivnih kcal) — dva treninga snage (hack squat 13.986 kg u utorak, plus četvrtkov čučanj), dva plivanja (bazenski intervalni set 2,2 km i kratko tehničko plivanje) i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak i petak bili su dani odmora. Oporavak je stabilan: RHR na 54 i HRV 37 (tik ispod osnovice) nakon čvrstih 6h58 uz ocjenu 84. Dobri uvjeti za trap-bar danas — neka zagrijavanje odredi najtežu seriju. Sljedeće: danas trap-bar MD, zatim odmor/planinarenje u nedjelju po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 5.7. → 11.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
